title: MUHUOTU 木火土｜單瓶正面白底商品圖
summary: 木火土寵物友善香氛噴霧 100ml 霧面白瓶，金屬印刷 Logo，純白無縫背景標準商品攝影。
prompt: A clean, high-end product photography of a single 100ml matte white cylindrical aerosol fragrance spray bottle. The bottle features a circular gold logo emblem with leaf, flame, and mountain-wave motifs. Gold metallic print reads: "木 火 土 MUHUOTU" in elegant serif and sans-serif typography. Below the logo: "寵物友善香氛噴霧 / PET-FRIENDLY FRAGRANCE SPRAY" in clean sans-serif. A small gold paw print icon centered on the bottle. Footer text: "天然植萃配方 / 寵物友善・安心使用" and "100ml e 3.5 fl. oz." Pure white seamless background, soft diffused studio lighting, ultra-sharp 8K commercial product shot. Mood: minimal, premium, trustworthy.
